notes: No recovery layer, no overlay, no floating hints.
Native open_app remains the product path; no visible code.run /app link is used for the comments button.
services/maxApi.js now prefers a self-contained ak_<base64url> payload with commentKey/channelId/postId/messageId before legacy h_ handoff.
services/postMetaService.js decodes ak_ payload and resolves through Postgres first, then store fallback.
services/postPatcher.js persists postSnapshot-style raw data in ak_posts.raw: originalText, originalFormat, originalLink, sourceAttachments without inline_keyboard, handoffToken and stablePayload.
Test target: create a new Post 33/34 after deploy, verify it opens, then redeploy and verify the same post still opens.
